qas.q: Describe the length of Air Force trousers/slacks
qas.a: Resting on the front of the shoe with a slight break in the crease. The back is 7/8 of an inch longer than the front

qas.q: Earrings worn by females must meet what criteria
qas.a: Round or square, not more than 6mm, conservative, white diamond, gold, white pearl, or silver

qas.q: How do females wear the flight cap?
qas.a: On the crown of the head hair may protrude from the front

qas.q: How many rings may a cadet wear in uniform
qas.a: No more than 3

qas.q: The Air Force philosophy is that the uniform will be
qas.a: Plain distinctive and standardized

qas.q: What is a gig line?
qas.a: A line formed by the facing of the shirt the buckle edge and the fly if the pants

qas.q: What is the maximum length for female hair?
qas.a: Not to exceed 3 1/2 inches from scalp

qas.q: What is the proper placement of the name tag on a female service uniform?
qas.a: 1 1/2 inches above or below the first exposed button centered between the arm seam and the facing

qas.q: What are the five elements of the Air Force dress and appearance standard
qas.a: Neatness cleanliness safety uniformity and military image

qas.q: What is the publication that governs dress and appearance of Air Force personnel
Describe the restrictions for nail polish in uniform
qas.a: No extreme colors. Cannot contrast skin or detract from uniform. Males are not authorized

qas.q: How do males wear the flight cap
qas.a: Squarely on the head no hair protruding from the front slight tilt to the wearers right

qas.q: What is one exception to wearing gear gears indoors
qas.a: When bearing arms

qas.q: What is the proper placement of the name tag on a male service uniform
qas.a: Centered on but not over top edge of right pocket

qas.q: What is the spacing between ribbons on a service uniform
qas.a: Zero spacing

qas.q: On the Air Force flight cap what signifies that the wearer is an officer
qas.a: A silver and blue edge braid

qas.q: What is the proper placement of the name tag on the service coat
qas.a: Center Metallica name tag on right side between the sleeve seam and the lapel. Bottom of name tag will be parallel with bottom of ribbons

qas.q: Is standing or walking with your hands in your pockets authorized in uniform
qas.a: No

qas.q: What is the maximum length for male hair
qas.a: 1 1/4 inch in bulk

qas.q: Are ribbons authorized on the service uniform
qas.a: All, some or none

qas.q: What is the grooming standard for a mustache
qas.a: Must be neatly trimmed not to extend downward beyond the lip line of the upper lip or extend sideways beyond a vertical line drawn upward from both corners of the mouth

qas.q: On what uniform combinations is the name tag not worn
qas.a: Mess dress and and semi formal

qas.q: When wearing a tie how long can it be
qas.a: Tip of tie must cover a portion of the belt buckle but cannot extend below the bottom of belt buckle

qas.q: What type of sunglasses are unauthorized in uniform
qas.a: Mirrored faddish

qas.q: Describe female hair bands and stays
qas.a: Conservative hair pins combs headbands and barrettes black in color regardless of hair color

qas.q: What is the proper placement of ribbons on the male service uniform
qas.a: Centered resting on but not over top edge of left pocket between the left and right edges

qas.q: When is a white crew neck T-shirt authorized
qas.a: With a closed collar shirt

qas.q: What is the proper placement of the tie tack/clasp
qas.a: Center optional tie tack or tie clasp (Air Force symbol, grade insignia, or wing and star) between bottom edge of knot and bottom tip of tie

qas.q: What is the proper placement of ribbons on a female service uniform
qas.a: Centered on left side parallel with ground. Align bottom of the ribbons with the bottom of name tag

qas.q: What is the length of the Air Force skirt
qas.a: Will be no shorter than the top of the kneecap or longer that the bottom of the kneecap

qas.q: What is the proper placement of the US insignia on the service coat
qas.a: The US lapel insignia is placer halfway up the seam, resting on but not over it. The US letters are parallel with the ground

qas.q: Of all the Air Force service uniforms which or is not authorized for officers to wear
qas.a: Semi formal dress

qas.q: For officer and enlisted airmen what is is the difference for the US insignia worn on the service coat
qas.a: For enlisted personnel the US has a circle around it

qas.q: Describe the officers braid on the service coat
qas.a: General officers will wear a 1 1/2 inch wide blue sleeve braid, 3 inches for the end of the sleeve. All others will wear a 1/2 inch wide blue sleeve braid 3 inches from the end of the sleeve

qas.q: Describe the USAF hap Arnold symbol
qas.a: A star with a circle in the middle and feathered wings above the star

qas.q: When wearing the service coat are you required to wear ribbons
qas.a: You must wear all or some
